goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'north' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 15:45' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge

The restaurant should serve chinese food
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave after 15:45 and should leave on wednesday
The train should go to london kings cross and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time
